conda-build-helper-missing.description: The conda-build helper script could not be opened or executed.
conda-build-helper-missing.recovery: Re-run the planner with a valid --conda-build-helper path or refresh the helper checkout.

container-command-timeout.description: The outer isolated Singularity live validation command exceeded its configured timeout.
container-command-timeout.recovery: Inspect the isolated state/cache/channel directories, warm caches or narrow steps, then retry with a larger --timeout-seconds if appropriate.

helper-missing.description: A generic setup helper required by the runbook is unavailable.
helper-missing.recovery: Resolve the missing helper path before retrying the affected runbook step.

local-source-missing-for-ref.description: --local-source-ref was provided without a matching --local-source package.
local-source-missing-for-ref.recovery: Provide the matching local source path or remove the unmatched local source ref.

local-source-ref-mismatch.description: A provided local git checkout HEAD does not match the recipe-required upstream ref.
local-source-ref-mismatch.recovery: Create a detached worktree at the required ref, provide a corrected checkout, or provide a trusted source archive.

local-source-target-ref-missing.description: A provided local git checkout does not contain the recipe-required upstream ref.
local-source-target-ref-missing.recovery: Fetch tags/refs for the checkout or provide a source checkout/archive that contains the required version.

missing-required-commands.description: The selected isolated container starts but does not include commands required for the requested live check.
missing-required-commands.recovery: Use or build a container image that contains the required command set.

network-download-failed.description: A network download failed while fetching a package, source, registry, or dependency artifact.
network-download-failed.recovery: Provide a local source checkout/archive, use a reachable mirror, or retry with available network access.

registry-download-failed.description: The container image registry could not be resolved or downloaded.
registry-download-failed.recovery: Provide a local Singularity .sif image path, use a reachable mirror, or reuse a populated isolated cache.

source-download-failed.description: The upstream source download failed while building circuit-tool packages.
source-download-failed.recovery: Ask the user for local KLayout/Xschem source checkouts or trusted source archives, then re-plan with --local-source.

source-missing.description: A requested upstream source checkout path does not exist.
source-missing.recovery: Ask the user for a corrected local checkout path or skip upstream-installed tests.

source-test-missing.description: The local upstream source exists but does not contain the expected test assets.
source-test-missing.recovery: Use a complete upstream checkout at the expected project version.

tclsh-missing.description: The full Xschem upstream regression profile requires tclsh, but no tclsh executable was found.
tclsh-missing.recovery: Install or expose Tcl in the environment, or re-plan with --upstream-profile basic.

tool-missing.description: An installed-tool upstream test could not find the required tool executable.
tool-missing.recovery: Install or repair the missing tool exposure in the pixi global monata-env environment.
